tasks.title: Inspect MCP documentation
tasks.prompt: Read README.md and docs/*.md. Return a concise structured review of whether the repository presents itself as an installable MCP server.

tasks.title: Inspect result schemas
tasks.prompt: Read schemas/*.json. Return a concise structured review of whether task plans and agent results are controller-readable.

tasks.title: Summarize repository readiness
tasks.prompt: Summarize the repository readiness as an MCP package. Include only JSON matching the requested schema.
